faqs.question: Is this officially integrated with ICE or IET submission portals?
faqs.answer: The platform is UK-SPEC aligned and export-ready for application workflows. Direct integrations can be scoped separately.

faqs.question: Can candidates and managers both use the system?
faqs.answer: Yes. Candidates log evidence and CPD, while managers and mentors review progression and provide structured feedback.

faqs.question: Can we pilot first before a full rollout?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Most customers start with one business unit and expand after proving improved readiness.

faqs.question: How long does onboarding usually take?
faqs.answer: Most pilot teams can be onboarded in 1-2 weeks, depending on number of users and readiness of your current CPD and evidence process.

faqs.question: Can we track CPD hours and evidence in one place?
faqs.answer: Yes. CPDPath supports structured CPD hours logging alongside competency-linked evidence, so teams can monitor both activity and readiness in one workflow.
